title: DSPT Open Lab Days #7 @ Católica Porto Business School: Beyond the Demo
description:
We’re back with another **DSPT Open Lab Day**, this time in partnership with **Católica Porto Business School**.

This RSVP is for the **full afternoon**: coworking + evening roundtable + networking.

Spots are limited to **25 coworking seats**, so please only RSVP here if you’re planning to join us for the afternoon.

**What to expect**
Bring your laptop, grab a seat, and work alongside other people from the AI/data community. If you usually work remotely, this is a nice excuse to spend an afternoon around other builders, researchers, founders, and data people.

In the evening, we’ll wrap the day with:
**Beyond the Demo — AI Founders Roundtable + AMA**
The AI founders are TBA, stay tuned :)

**Cowork**
13:00 — Get together
13:30–18:00 — Coworking

**Roundtable + networking**
18:00 — Get together
18:10 — Welcome by DSPT
18:20 — Beyond the Demo: AI Founders Roundtable + AMA
18:40 — Q&A
19:00–20:00 — Networking & bites

**Practical notes**
\- Free event
\- Limited to 25 coworking spots
\- Lunch is not included\, so grab something before joining us\. You can eat at CPBS and there are restaurants nearby
\- Exact room/check\-in details will be shared closer to the date
\- If your plans change\, please update your RSVP so someone else can join
See you at Católica Porto Business School 👋

title: DSPT AI on Tap #5 @ Cerveja Canil
description:
**🍻 Data Science Portugal presents: DSPT AI on Tap back in Lisbon**

We’re bringing AI on Tap back to Lisbon. No slides. No talks. Just great people, casual conversation, and craft beer. If you work with AI, study it, build products, do research, or you’re simply curious, you’re welcome. Digital nomads, students, corporate AI folks, founders, and newcomers all fit right in.

**Conversation starter: bring 1 thing to share**

To make it easy to meet people, we invite everyone to bring one small “conversation seed”. Any of these works:

* 📌 A question you’re currently stuck on
* 🧠 A concept you finally understood
* 🧪 A mini experiment you tried
* 🛠️ A tool, workflow, or prompt pattern you’re using
* 📰 A recent paper, blog post, or demo you found interesting
* 💼 A real-world use case you’re exploring at work or school

You can keep it short, 30 to 60 seconds is perfect.

**What to expect**

* 🍺 Great craft beer and relaxed community vibes
* 🤝 Easy networking, no awkward forced intros
* 💬 Small groups, practical chats, and lots of shared learning
* 🌍 A diverse crowd: newcomers and experienced folks

📅 **When:** June 24
🕓 **Time:** 5:45 PM
📌 **Location:** Cerveja Canil

Bring your curiosity, grab a drink, and come share your top pick of the year. 🍻

**RSVP now!**
